human_verification.notes: Reviewed healthcare-specific compliance boundaries, OIG/CMS/OCR authority sources, PHI and minimum-necessary handling, payer authorization and referral dependencies, clinical and patient-safety escalation, scenario-to-ability coverage, and refusal of legal, fraud, privacy, payer, coding, billing, and clinical signoff.

review_notes: All required issue scenario families and healthcare-and-care-delivery research contract families are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for shared specialist behavior, compliance-controls-and-governance, and healthcare-and-care-delivery are represented and validated.
No retained-implementation runtime is claimed; runtime remains specification-based until a separate governance-approved build is promoted.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to healthcare compliance obligation mapping, evidence handling, finding classification, remediation tracking, review preparation, and escalation support.

Authority sources cover OIG compliance program infrastructure, OIG exclusion checks, OCR HIPAA privacy and minimum-necessary handling, CMS medical review, CMS managed-care operating dependencies, CMS measure lifecycle guidance, and CMS/AHRQ patient-safety workflow guidance.

Scenario set covers incomplete audit evidence, policy and payer conflicts, legal/fraud territory, PHI handling, authorization/referral/eligibility blockers, clinical judgment boundaries, patient safety escalation, adjacent-lane routing, low-confidence handling, tenant adaptation, and specification-based deployment gating.

Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation/results.json and evaluation/functionality-map.json, and runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted retained implementation exists.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains for the validated spec pack. Jurisdiction, payer, provider type, facility, service setting, tenant policy, state rule, and record-system differences are handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated specification-based use under documented deployment and rollback controls.
